examples: It is a proven fact that fluoride strengthens growing teeth.
At this stage, the tooth can repair the weakened area with the help of fluoride and minerals in saliva.
A litre of teacan contain up to 9mg of fluoride, which in excess can cause skeletal fluorosis, reducing bone quality and causing pain and stiffening of the ligaments.
Other fluids like fluoride salts can operate at high temperatures but at safer, lower pressures.
Rival ideas withered, among them the thorium liquid-fuel reactor, powered by molten fluoride salt containing thorium.
